item.title: It's time for yet another unhinged XL Sunday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
this is why i don't drink anymore
guess i have something to look forward to
poor gal
the blob cuz it's so slow? what say you guys?
friend shaped
the good stuff
mmm hmm
as is tradition
100%
we've all done this
eric and chloe make me sick tbh.. see ya
uuurrrrr
what could go wrong?
all of my childhood pictures exist in film format only
finally some excitement in salad making
yes
that's all for this one.. have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: Day #whatever of me trying to change people’s minds about spiders
item.description: Dewdrop would like to wave “hello!” to all my internet friends! She’s a Phidippus regius, or regal jumping spider. I love her not just because her personality is so chill and friendly (she sits & watches Jeopardy with me most nights) but because her coloration is rare for a female! Blue chelicerae (the shiny part of her face that matches my nails) are almost exclusively seen in male regals **as always: NO jump scares, feedings, etc. cute spoods only**
item.dc:creator: stonedlikeicheckedoutmedusa

item.title: "You'll never have to vote again!"
item.description: VOTE YOUR ENTIRE BALLOT every election! • Register/check/RECHECK registration at vote.gov • Confirm your state's requirements & voting dates/times -- early voting is often easier than waiting for Election Day • Decide now when you'll go vote (or mail your ballot) & put it in your calendar so you're committed -- ?GET OTHERS TO COMMIT TOO • Start learning about your ballot at ballotpedia.org -- take your notes with you to vote! • Use trackvote.org for ballot tracking/confirm your vote's counted
item.dc:creator: RenegadeSci

item.title: Michelle Jenneke Has Made the Australian Track & Field Team for Paris 2024, 100m hurdles
item.description: Jenneke will begin competition at the 2024 Paris Games with the first round of the women's 100m hurdles on Wednesday, August 7. The final is slated for Saturday, August 10. https://www.si.com/onsi/athlete-lifestyle/news/michelle-jenneke-dance-australia-track-olympics-photos-video
item.dc:creator: Jbelkin

item.title: THIS IS A THREAT
item.description: FUCK I forgot to edit the font in the center text. Whatever, add "lying" to the list. It's worse like this. Maybe. July 29th snuck RIGHT UP on me. EDIT: I just remembered I tagged all last year's posts with "garbagemen" because that's what I was calling July 29th-ers who truly upvote everything. Tagging this one too. Be garbagemen, people.

item.title: Having a nice relaxing afternoon when...
item.description:
My daughter started yelling fire!
I ran down three flights if stairs and ran to the fire thinking it was small, it was not I turned and ran and got all the children and animals out, 2 dogs, 2 rats, a kitten and a hamster. All whilst calling 999 and running to be able to direct the fire brigade yo the back of the house as its not easily found.
Do not know how I could run, after my cancer surgery but the human body on adrenaline is a remarkable thing
I raced to the bottom of our road and the fore crew where literally there ein about 2.5 mins incredibly grateful.
Tell them I have electric bikes and hybrid and they race there and do their thing, their incredible amazingly brave thing. Thank you guys.
I am in the middle of a new deck being built and all the wood was in the garage along with the car, a new sofa, bikes, fridge freezer full of food. Work computer.. so much.
I'd also cleaned the car this morning... so sad
Need the car for work, I'm f**bed for work for a few weeks and no leave left due to cancer treatment. I work for a charity but they suck with staff welfare.
Hope your Sunday has been better than ours. It's only material things I keep telling myself, kids and ani.als are all safe. Neighbours got a lovely entertainment event, drone and everything. Glad it was fun for eveyone but us. I do have noce neighbours and a ehole hearted thank you goes out to them. However 2024 can go f**k itself. Edit So much support and kind words. Waking up this morning and thr realisation it hadn't been a dream was not great. Having such a hard time already with insurance and getting an electrician.
item.dc:creator: sixtyfortysoo

item.title: the harpy's meme library: volume 51 (tomfoolery)
item.description:
Hello and welcome to another meme dump, imgur friends. I desire it to be spooky time already, summer is awful.
Yes, I am definitely not secretly a cryptid in a human suit.
Humor is how I cope with things, the regular people are not happy with that
so lame
Nope
yes
Big nope, fuck summer
Speaking of oppressive heat, remember to stay hydrated, friends
The combined hours of my tattoos so far has gotta be close to 24 hours now, so I have spent almost a whole day of my life getting needles jammed into my skin
Join the coven, ladies That's all for this meme dump, imgur friends. Until next time, stay awesome.
item.dc:creator: SecretHarpy

item.title: Hug your pets.
item.description:
A follow up to my post 'Defying The Odds' - https://imgur.com/gallery/defying-odds-g3t4JJy After doing so well for so long, Jaz started to go downhill four weeks ago. By last weekend she'd deteriorated so badly that we knew it was time to say goodbye to her after 15 wonderful years. Taking her on that last trip to the vet was one of the hardest things I've ever had to do in my life. The vet confirmed that the cancer had gone to her liver and probably other places as well and that there was no more to be done for her other than to release her from her suffering. She hated vets and would shake and cower whenever we had to take her to one but this time she remained perfectly calm and passed peacefully in our arms. The house is now so quiet & empty without her and the utter sense of loss has at times been overwhelming. For such a small dog the hole she has left is disproportionately huge. Many, many tears have been shed by both of us, and I've no doubt there will be more to come. I'm 'happy' that we did the right thing by her in the end and that we gave her the best possible life we could for 15 years but damn, coming to terms with her loss is proving to be more difficult than I could ever have imagined. Hug your pets people.
6 weeks old just after she joined us.
Looking cute, something she was very good at.
"Get off Imgur and feed me!"
Much awoos.
One of my favourite pictures of her.
The last picture I took of her. She was so sad and tired.
item.dc:creator: PrincePiggo

item.title: Sunday dump to distract from the dumpster fire

Oh no lmfaoo
Facts.
Why do I feel like there's a story here hahaha
The vibes are immaculate
Animal break. Sound on
Sound on.
King Himbo
Some people need to hear this.
Self care.
E.x.e has stopped working
Yeah, where's my fanfic??
She deserved to treat herself.
Animal tax, sound on.
Animal tax, sound on.
Animal tax!
Animal tax: the music adds to it loll. Have a good day fuckers! <3
